contexts.context: ...beside my desk puts me in mind of the <mark>rise</mark> and fall of the telegram as a means of...
..., mocking, tender, full of grief, <mark>rising</mark> to moments of lyrical joy.  Rarely even...
...this:  I had been reading a paperback cqalled "The <mark>Rise</mark> of the South African Reich" by Brian Bunting and...
...the bookshops. I am sending you herewith The <mark>Rising</mark> Tide - the first in the series of reprints...
